dailyNews.title: More money was borrowed under BJP rule, claims Siddaramaiah
dailyNews.description: The CM says that in four years, the BJP govt. borrowed ₹5,30,000 crore while the Congress govt. has taken ₹2,56,000 crore in three years

dailyNews.title: Amazon Cloud Infrastructure In Bahrain Damaged In Iran Strike: Report
dailyNews.description: Batelco facility hosting AWS systems was hit by strikes amid escalating threats to US tech assets.

dailyNews.title: Hasbro says it was hacked, and may take ‘several weeks’ to recover
dailyNews.description: The American toymaking giant noted that it was continuing to "implement measures to secure its business operations," suggesting that the hackers may still be in the company's systems.

dailyNews.title: Congress planning law to appease religious minorities in Assam: PM
dailyNews.description: Addressing poll rallies, PM claims Congress plans to enact communal violence law that is unfair to Hindus; vows to protect Assamese identity, predicts a hat-trick win for NDA in Assembly election

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court Birthright Citizenship case hearing LIVE: Trump arrives as SCOTUS weighs Prez bid to restrict right

dailyNews.title: North Korea-linked hackers breach Axios software to target US firms; crypto theft feared: Report
dailyNews.description: Suspected North Korean hackers breached the open-source Axios package, pushing malicious updates to many US firms. Experts warn of a prolonged campaign to steal crypto funds. Dozens of devices are already compromised, with wider impact expected across industries.

dailyNews.title: Middle East war: UK PM Keir Starmer calls for closer EU partnership, says ‘US won't be there to help’
dailyNews.description: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer on Wednesday (local time), in a press conference, has sought closer ties with UK's European allies. He added that London has paused fuel duty till September to help Britons amid the ongoing conflict.

dailyNews.title: ‘Permanent scar’: Iran minister on US-Israeli attacks on monuments
dailyNews.description: Iran’s cultural heritage minister tells Al Jazeera damage to 56 sites is a ‘deliberate war' on the country's identity.

dailyNews.title: ‘Infiltrator’ vs ‘mafia rule’: PM Modi, Priyanka Gandhi exchange barbs as Assam contest heats up
dailyNews.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi made an infiltrator pitch and accused the Congress of being the "root cause of corruption".

dailyNews.title: Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei out, IRGC in? Iran's Revolutionary Guard takes de facto control of govt, claims report
dailyNews.description: As Iran continues to be under attack by the US and Israel, the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) reportedly blocked presidential appointments and decisions, effectively sidelining the government from executive control.

dailyNews.title: How are NATO allies pushing back against Trump’s Iran war demands?
dailyNews.description: Trump says he is considering a NATO exit as allies resist cooperation in US-Israel war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the day by Vince Lombardi: ‘The price of success is hard work, dedication to the job at hand…’
dailyNews.description: Vince Lombardi's powerful words remind us what is truly important. He breaks success down into its core components, highlighting how hard work and dedication are crucial to any task a person has taken on.

dailyNews.description: Advocates warn of fallout for immigrants as challenge to Trump executive order to be heard before top US court.

dailyNews.title: ‘Lockdown notice’ goes viral on April Fools Day amid US-Iran war tensions
dailyNews.description: The notice is circulating amid the ongoing war between Iran and the United States, backed by Israel.

dailyNews.title: Rubio says US may need to 'reexamine' NATO membership after allies blocked basing, airspace help
dailyNews.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio says NATO has become a "one-way street" after European allies denied U.S. basing rights during Operation Epic Fury.

dailyNews.title: Megan Thee Stallion rushed to hospital after Broadway show stops mid-performance
dailyNews.description: Megan Thee Stallion was hospitalized after falling ill during her Broadway run of "Moulin Rouge! The Musical," her rep confirmed, halting the show mid-performance.

dailyNews.title: Trump Signs Order Seeking Federal Control of Mail Voting as He Promotes False Claims
dailyNews.description: Election experts and Democratic officials called the order legally invalid, and Arizona and Oregon pledged to immediately challenge it in court.

dailyNews.title: Justice Dept. Struggles to Respond to Trump’s Suit Against IRS
dailyNews.description: Officials at the department and the White House are in the middle of a messy and complicated debate over how to respond to President Trump’s lawsuit demanding $10 billion from the I.R.S.

dailyNews.title: Judge Approves Trump Effort to Obtain List of Jews From University of Pennsylvania
dailyNews.description: The government’s effort to collect the names and phone numbers of Jewish people on campus as it investigates antisemitism has upset some people who worry about how the information will be used.

dailyNews.description: In Iran, the schedule is our most malleable illusion.

dailyNews.title: Trump gives potential timeline for end of Iran war
dailyNews.description: President Trump is signalling a potential end to the Iran war. CBS News' Holly Williams reports.

dailyNews.title: Listen Live: Supreme Court hears birthright citizenship case, with Trump attending
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court is hearing arguments over President Trump's bid to end birthright citizenship, a case that tests one of the cornerstones of his immigration agenda.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens to walk away from Iran war and pull U.S. out of NATO
dailyNews.description: Trump says he expects the U.S. war with Iran to end within several weeks despite unrelenting attacks from both sides and Iran's iron grip on the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump signs executive order to limit mail-in voting
dailyNews.description: President Trump signed an executive order to curb access to mail-in voting ahead of the midterm elections. CBS News' Ed O'Keefe reports.

dailyNews.title: Gas prices hit $4.06 a gallon before Trump's prime-time address
dailyNews.description: U.S. gasoline prices continue to inch higher after crossing the $4 a gallon threshold on Tuesday for the first time since 2022.

dailyNews.title: What to know ahead of Trump's address on Iran war
dailyNews.description: President Trump is set to address the nation about the Iran war as the world awaits an end to the conflict in the Middle East. CBS News' Weijia Jiang, who spoke to Mr. Trump on Tuesday, reports.
